lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no major dents. The interior shows light wear on the seats and dashboard. All mechanical systems are functioning as intended.
This car is in poor condition and needs significant work.

This vehicle is in mint condition. There are no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical and electronic systems are fully functional, and the car has been maintained to original standards.

This vehicle is being sold in poor condition and will require a dedicated buyer prepared for a significant project. It is currently not in running order due to major engine and transmission issues that need immediate professional attention. The exterior shows heavy signs of age and neglect, including substantial rust through the rocker panels, large dents on the rear quarter panel, and severely faded paint. Inside, the upholstery is torn in multiple places and there is a persistent musty odor. This car is strictly an 'as-is' sale, ideal for parts or a complete ground-up restoration for a mechanical enthusiast.

Calling all restoration fans and DIY enthusiasts! This car is a fantastic blank canvas ready for a dedicated owner to bring it back to life. While it currently needs significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it offers a rewarding opportunity for someone looking to take on a true project and save a piece of automotive history. Roll up your sleeves and get ready to create something special!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior looks great with only minor surface scratches and small door dings expected from regular use. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and has a consistent service history, though it may soon require standard preventative maintenance like new brake pads. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. It’s a reliable, solid choice for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle that is ready for the road.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, a specimen that represents the zenith of automotive maintenance. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical system has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! 🚗 Honestly, I’m a bit sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute pristine, showroom condition—not a single scratch or ding to be found. It looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken incredibly good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for absolute perfection, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 4.0L V8, featuring individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a GKN-sourced M-Variable limited-slip differential. Mechanically flawless, the rod bearings have been addressed preventatively, and the chassis remains rigid with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) providing exceptional lateral stability. The exterior boasts a pristine carbon fiber roof and factory Interlagos Blue paint with no signs of oxidation or road rash. Documented service history confirms this is a collector-grade specimen with zero subframe fatigue or VANOS issues.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Maintenance records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the 'mint' standard. This car has been meticulously garage-kept under a breathable cover and has never seen rain or snow. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster, protected by a professionally applied multi-layer ceramic coating; there are absolutely no rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings to be found. Every panel gap is laser-straight, and the original alloy wheels are free of any curb rash, wrapped in high-performance tires with nearly full tread remaining.

Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition. The premium leather seats show no signs of bolsters wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that distinct 'new car' scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. The dashboard is flawless, with no UV fading or cracking.

Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive binder containing every service record since new, documenting oil changes performed every 3,000 miles regardless of usage. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the transmission shifts with factory-spec precision. Sale includes two sets of keys, the original window sticker, all owner's manuals, and the factory tool kit. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that looks, feels, and drives like a brand-new vehicle.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, currently maintained in showroom-grade condition. This specimen exhibits an unrivaled aesthetic, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously detailed interior that remains free of wear. Beyond its striking appearance, the vehicle has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical perfection and peak performance. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that transcends the typical secondary market, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a masterpiece of automotive engineering in its most pristine form.
